summary: Iteration 2 fully tested: 15/15 backend pytest passed; new Journal & Mock Tests endpoints work correctly (upsert idempotent on date, percentage auto-calc, max_score<=0 returns 400, stats/overview shape, sorted-by-date-desc). Export now includes journal+mock_tests; import?replace=true clears them. Frontend revamped to cream/playful neo-brutalist theme verified (body bg rgb(255,247,227)). Duration chips remain BLACK (rgb(0,0,0)) on goal-chip, today-total-chip, and records-total-chip. Journal & Mocks views fully functional (save/idempotency/list/delete/chart). Share streak modal opens with share-card and download-PNG button. Session-log integration updates today total and by_subject correctly.

design_issues.screen: Mocks (Performance trend chart on first render)
issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer logs width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on first mount; chart still renders fine after layout settles. Same minor warning seen on Stats view in iteration 1.

critical_code_review_comments: App.js is now ~1221 lines after the rewrite; recommend splitting JournalView, MocksView, ShareStreakCard, and other view components into separate files under /app/frontend/src/components/ for maintainability

Backend POST /api/import does not validate types (e.g., journal entries without 'date' or mock_tests without numeric score). Consider adding Pydantic validation for imported items to avoid bad data corrupting collections

GET /api/journal/{entry_date} returns id:null for missing dates which is convenient but slightly inconsistent with REST norms (404 would be more standard); current behavior matches the documented contract, leaving as-is
DELETE /api/subjects keeps orphan sessions intentionally; same now applies to mock_tests when subject_id is referenced — consider documenting this for users or clearing subject_name on subject delete
seed_data_creation: All test artifacts cleaned up after each test; one transient TEST_UI_IntSub subject created and deleted during the session-log integration check (its 13-min session remains as orphan record by design).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers Subjects, Sessions, Stats, Settings, Export/Import (with new journal+mock_tests fields), Journal CRUD with same-date upsert idempotency, and Mock Tests CRUD with auto-percentage + stats/overview shape + max_score<=0 -> 400 validation. Frontend public URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL works. Verified: body bg cream rgb(255,247,227), duration chip text rgb(0,0,0) on goal-chip/today-total-chip/records-total-chip, share-streak-btn opens share-modal with share-card + share-download-btn. Journal POST same-date stays at 1 list entry (upsert verified in UI). Mocks form creates a row + chart populates. Session log updates today-total-chip and today-by-subject.
